---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that doesn't work as expected
title: "bug: "
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

```bash
# the exact command(s) you ran, e.g.
screex index recording.mp4 --fps 2
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual output

Paste the full output, including any stack trace.

```
<output here>
```

## Environment

- OS: <e.g. Windows 11 / Ubuntu 22.04 / macOS 14>
- Python version: <python --version>
- Screex version: <screex --version>
- Extras installed: <none / audio / capture>

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — sample characteristics of the recording (length, fps,
resolution), whether it reproduces on a synthetic clip, etc. Please do **not** attach private
recordings.
